Samuel Rodriguez

Director of Zero-G Operations

Orbital Assembly

Biography Profile

Samuel oversees the practical implementation of artificial gravity and anti-gravity systems on orbital platforms. With a background in structural engineering and orbital mechanics, he ensures that theoretical drives do not tear experimental stations apart. He previously managed ISS life-support systems.

Symposium Presentation

"Structural Integrity under Non-Standard Gravity Loads"

A critical look at how spacecraft and terrestrial platforms must be redesigned to withstand the sheer forces generated by localized gravity disruption and propulsion systems.

Powered by our Sponsors

AeroDyne Systems
